ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_EVENT.title: Astral Event
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_EVENT.description: A special card originating from the Astral Party event system.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_STEPS.title: Steps
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_STEPS.description: Steps gained from room entry for [Persona: Bionic Jasmine]. Unassigned, Rest Site, Shop, Treasure, Monster, and Map rooms grant [blue]2[/blue]. Event rooms grant [blue]3[/blue]. Elite rooms grant [blue]6[/blue]. Boss rooms grant [blue]10[/blue].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_TEMPORARY.title: Temporary
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_TEMPORARY.descript: Discard this card at the end of turn. This keyword is removed after the card enters the discard pile.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_ETERNAL_STARLIGHT_:
When you enter a shop, gain extra effects based on your Eternal Starlight stacks:
· If Eternal Starlight is at least [blue]10[/blue], gain [blue]5[/blue] Gold
· If Eternal Starlight is at least [blue]25[/blue], gain [blue]15[/blue] Gold
· If Eternal Starlight is at least [blue]40[/blue], gain [blue]25[/blue] Gold
· If Eternal Starlight is at least [blue]56[/blue], gain [blue]25[/blue] Gold and immediately obtain Membership Card
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_DICE_SET.title: Set: Dice
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_DICE_SET.descripti:
When you own any [blue]2[/blue] dice relics, reduce the trigger requirement to obtain another die relic by [blue]1[/blue].
When you own any [blue]5[/blue] dice relics, reduce the trigger requirement to obtain another die relic by [blue]2[/blue].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_FLASHLIGHT_SET.des:
As long as you own at least [blue]1[/blue] Flashlight relic, at the start of combat apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Exposure[/gold] to all enemies.
When you kill an enemy with [gold]Exposure[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold].
If you own any [blue]2[/blue] Boxing Glove relics, gain [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red] at combat start.
If you own all [blue]3[/blue], gain [blue]3[/blue] [red]Strength[/red] instead.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_DREAMSHIP_SERIES.d: A special chip from the [gold]Dreamship[/gold] series.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_SPIRIT_FESTIVAL_SE: A special chip from the [gold]Spirit Festival[/gold] series.
A special chip from the [gold]Water Town[/gold] series.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_MAGIC_ACADEMY_SERI: A special chip from the [gold]Magic Academy[/gold] series.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_DRAGON_PALACE_SERI: A special chip from the [gold]Dragon Palace[/gold] series.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_GHOST_ALLEY_SET.de: If the current combat is an Elite or Boss room, at the start of each of your turns gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Modification[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_COLLECTION.title: Collection
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_COLLECTION.descrip: A special card pool mainly intended for commemorative value.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_UNIQUE.title: Unique
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_UNIQUE.description: Only [blue]1[/blue] Unique card with the same name can remain in your hand. If a same-name [gold]Unique[/gold] card is already there, the later card added to hand is automatically [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_COOLDOWN.title: Cooldown
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_COOLDOWN.descripti: This card also has the effects of [gold]Unique[/gold], [gold]Retain[/gold], and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_INVESTIGATION_PROG:
Whenever a target with [power]Investigation Target[/power] is killed, the killer triggers the current-stage [gold]Concealing Investigation[/gold] event card, and the holder of [relic]Persona: Bonnie[/relic] gains [blue]5[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
Every [blue]6[/blue] successful triggers, the stage advances: [gold]Phase 1[/gold] -> [gold]Phase 2[/gold] -> [gold]Phase 3[/gold] -> [gold]Truth Unveiled[/gold].
After [gold]Truth Unveiled[/gold] has successfully triggered [blue]6[/blue] more times, using [card]Concealing Operation[/card] on an Elite or Boss also triggers [gold]Truth Unveiled[/gold] immediately.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SOLAR_BOMBARDMENT.title: Solar Bombardment
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SOLAR_BOMBARDMENT.descrip: Discard all cards in your hand, then bombard random enemies. Base [blue]3[/blue] hits. For every [blue]2[/blue] discarded cards, bombard [blue]1[/blue] extra time. Base damage is [blue]3[/blue] and increases by [blue]1[/blue] for every {energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)} total cost among discarded cards. Discarded [blue]0[/blue]-cost cards count as {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, and discarded X-cost cards count as your current Energy.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_ORBITAL_BOMBARDMEN: When used as [gold]Orbital Bombardment Material[/gold], this card counts as [blue]2[/blue] cards and its cost counts as {energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)}.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_MIXED.title: Mixed
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_MIXED.description:
Attack: +[blue]1[/blue] temporary Strength
Defensive Skill: +[blue]1[/blue] temporary Dexterity
Skill (no Block): Heal [blue]1[/blue] HP
Power: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}
Status: Draw [blue]1[/blue] card
Curse: Heal [blue]1[/blue] HP and gain [blue]1[/blue] Block
